allow: Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\)\); const ev = d.events?.[0]; console.log\('Event name:', ev?.name\); console.log\('Event id:', ev?.id\); const comp = ev?.competitions?.[0]; const c0 = comp?.competitors?.[0]; console.log\('Competitor keys:', Object.keys\(c0 || {}\)\); console.log\('Athlete keys:', Object.keys\(c0?.athlete || {}\)\); console.log\('Full competitor 0:', JSON.stringify\(c0, null, 2\).slice\(0, 2000\)\); // Check for any completed events console.log\('Total events:', d.events?.length\); if \(d.events?.length > 1\) { const ev2 = d.events[1]; console.log\('Event 2 name:', ev2?.name\); } }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\)\); console.log\('Events:', d.events?.length\); d.events?.forEach\(ev => { console.log\('Event:', ev.name, 'Status:', ev.status?.type?.name\); const comp = ev.competitions?.[0]; const c0 = comp?.competitors?.[0]; console.log\('First competitor:', JSON.stringify\(c0, null, 2\)?.slice\(0, 500\)\); }\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\)\); const ev = d.events[0]; const comp = ev.competitions[0]; // Print ALL keys at every level for first competitor function printKeys\(obj, prefix=''\) { for \(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(obj\)\) { if \(v && typeof v === 'object' && !Array.isArray\(v\)\) { console.log\(prefix + k + ' \(obj\):', Object.keys\(v\).join\(', '\)\); printKeys\(v, prefix + ' '\); } else if \(Array.isArray\(v\)\) { console.log\(prefix + k + ' \(arr\):', v.length, 'items'\); if \(v.length > 0 && typeof v[0] === 'object'\) { printKeys\(v[0], prefix + ' [0].'\); } } else { console.log\(prefix + k + ':', v\); } } } printKeys\(comp.competitors[0]\); // Check for statistics or money fields in competition console.log\('\\\\n--- Competition keys:', Object.keys\(comp\)\); if \(comp.status\) console.log\('Status:', JSON.stringify\(comp.status\)\); // Also check ev keys console.log\('\\\\n--- Event keys:', Object.keys\(ev\)\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { try { const d = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d, null, 2\).slice\(0, 2000\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Parse error'\); } }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d, null, 2\).slice\(0, 3000\)\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d, null, 2\)\); }\); ")
Bash(node -e " const c = []; process.stdin.on\('data', d => c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\)\), null, 2\)\)\); " echo "---")
Bash(node -e " const c = []; process.stdin.on\('data', d => c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\)\), null, 2\)\)\); ")

Bash(node -e " const c = []; process.stdin.on\('data', d => c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\)\); console.log\('fullName:', d.fullName\); console.log\('displayName:', d.displayName\); console.log\('shortName:', d.shortName\); console.log\('firstName:', d.firstName\); console.log\('lastName:', d.lastName\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const c = []; process.stdin.on\('data', d => c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\)\); console.log\('Count:', d.count, 'PageSize:', d.pageSize, 'PageCount:', d.pageCount\); // Check first item for any inline data const c0 = d.items[0]; console.log\('Keys:', Object.keys\(c0\)\); console.log\('Has amateur:', c0.amateur\); console.log\('Movement:', c0.movement\); console.log\('Order:', c0.order\); }\); ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ids=set\(d['player_id'] for d in data\); print\(f'{len\(ids\)} players with lineups, {len\(data\)} total picks'\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const ids=new Set\(d.map\(r=>r.player_id\)\); console.log\(ids.size+' players with lineups, '+d.length+' total picks'\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);const comps=j.events?.[0]?.competitions?.[0]?.competitors||[];comps.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(c=>{const status=c.status||{};console.log\(c.athlete?.displayName, '| score:', c.score, '| pos:', status.position?.displayName, '| thru:', status.thru, '| state:', status.type?.name\)}\)}\)")
